generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure reinforced my existing support for expanded domestic security powers by presenting a compelling real-world example of a preventable attack. The personal testimony from a former counterterrorism analyst added credibility and urgency to the argument.

The 2024 London attack could've been prevented if agents had more authority to intervene early. #NationalSecurity #SafetyFirst
